name: gas-app-kit
description: Build and deploy React + TypeScript web apps to Google Apps Script — works on Windows, Mac, and Linux. No coding experience required.

skills.name: gas-using-ai-superpowers
skills.description: Meta-skill: enforces using skills before taking action.

skills.name: gas-start
skills.description: Advisor at the start of the flow. Understand project needs, create constitution, initialize state.

skills.name: gas-setup-environment
skills.description: Set up Node.js, clasp, and Google authentication. Run before first deploy.

skills.name: gas-init-project
skills.description: Initialize the React + TypeScript project and link it to Google Apps Script.

skills.name: gas-push
skills.description: Build and deploy the app to Google Apps Script.

skills.name: gas-pull
skills.description: Download the latest version from Google Apps Script for maintenance.

skills.name: gas-frontend-patterns
skills.description: React patterns for state management, forms, API calls, and error handling.

skills.name: gas-ant-design
skills.description: UI components with Ant Design: layout, forms, tables, modals, theming.

skills.name: gas-typescript-pro
skills.description: TypeScript strict mode patterns for Google Apps Script webapps.

commands.name: gas-app-kit
commands.description: Main entry point for the GAS App Kit.
